market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this exclusive standalone property where you’ll pay 44% less than the city’s average rate. Perfect for 4 travelers, our entire home offers privacy and value unmatched in the area. With 60 open nights remaining in the next 90 days, this is an incredible opportunity for guests seeking a relaxed stay without sacrificing space. Located near local attractions, the home maintains a perfect 5.0 rating from 8 reviews. While photos show functional spaces, we believe adding details about outdoor access, parking options, and entertainment features would make this affordable listing even more compelling to potential guests.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a wide-angle shot of the common living area as the cover photo to showcase space and ambiance—essential for first impressions on a listing with strong pricing.
key_diagnosis: Listing offers -44% discount vs city median (£175) but has only 8 reviews despite 60 open nights, suggesting low visibility
No amenities listed in any category, though outdoor, parking, and entertainment features are high-value differentiators in this market
Blank description prevents guests from understanding what makes this property unique despite its strong price advantage
analysis.outreach_hook: With a £97.2 rate (44% below the city median) yet only 33.7% occupancy, your listing represents untapped booking potential for 60 nights over the next 90 days.
